name: HRY_EVENT_PROCESS_DETAILS
description: Event Process details data gives the input to extracts runs for which persons to be picked up.

columns.Name: HRY_EVENT_EXT_PROCESS_DTL_ID
columns.Comments: Event Extract Process Detail Id

columns.Name: HRY_EVENT_CAT_TYPE_MAP_ID
columns.Comments: Event Category Type Mapping ID. Primary Key Column.

columns.Name: HRY_EVENT_CATEGORY_ID
columns.Comments: Event Category ID. Reference ID Mapping column from hry_event_categories table.

columns.Name: HRY_EVENT_EXT_RUN_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key mapping to HRY_EVENT_EXT_RUNS. This id gives source id and source run type values.

columns.Name: PAYROLL_REL_ID
columns.Comments: Payroll Relationship ID. Derived ID Value for a person.

columns.Name: PAYROLL_REL_NUM
columns.Comments: Payrol Relationship Number. Derived ID Value for a person.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person ID Value. Derived ID Value for a person.

columns.Name: PERSON_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Person Number Value. Derived ID Value for a person.

columns.Name: WORK_REL_ID
columns.Comments: Work Relationship ID. Derived ID Value for a person.

columns.Name: PAYROLL_ID
columns.Comments: Payroll ID Value. Derived ID Value for a person.

columns.Name: EVENT_PUBLISH_TIME
columns.Comments: Event Published Time for Payroll Connect.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_FROM
columns.Comments: Event Effective From Date. Indicates the date at which the row is effective.

columns.Name: KEY_VALUE1
columns.Comments: Identifier Value to be stroed in Key Value 1

columns.Name: KEY_VALUE2
columns.Comments: Identifier Value to be stroed in Key Value 2

columns.Name: KEY_VALUE3
columns.Comments: Identifier Value to be stroed in Key Value 3

columns.Name: KEY_VALUE4
columns.Comments: Identifier Value to be stroed in Key Value 4

columns.Name: KEY_VALUE5
columns.Comments: Identifier Value to be stroed in Key Value 5

columns.Name: PRIORITY
columns.Comments: Preference to be considered when running Payroll Connect.

columns.Name: OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: Genereated Object ID when an interface is run.

columns.Name: EXT_DEFINITION_ID
columns.Comments: Extract Definition ID Value of Payroll Connect.

columns.Name: KEY_IDENTIFIER1
columns.Comments: Identifier Column to be stroed in Key Identifier 1.

columns.Name: KEY_IDENTIFIER2
columns.Comments: Identifier Column to be stroed in Key Identifier 2.

columns.Name: KEY_IDENTIFIER3
columns.Comments: Identifier Column to be stroed in Key Identifier 3.

columns.Name: ECID
columns.Comments: ECID Value from the HRC Events Table.

columns.Name: ACTION_OCCURRENCE_ID
columns.Comments: Action Occurence ID Value from Hrc Events table.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Status of the Event Processed for Payroll Connect.

columns.Name: MESSAGE_TEXT
columns.Comments: Message Text to be displayed for Payroll Connect.

columns.Name: PROCESSED_DATE
columns.Comments: Processed Date of an Employee for Payroll Connect.

columns.Name: EXCLUDE_FROM_PROCESS
columns.Comments: Exclude From Process or not for Payroll Connect.

columns.Name: RETRY_COUNT
columns.Comments: Retry Counts maintained for Payroll Connect.

columns.Name: PURGE_DATE
columns.Comments: Date to be Purged for Payroll Connect.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

indexes.Columns: WORK_REL_ID, PAYROLL_ID, STATUS, EXT_DEFINITION_ID, EVENT_PUBLISH_TIME, EFFECTIVE_FROM, PRIORITY
